# ⚡ AutoDev Repository & AI Agent Guide

This file contains automated environment details, command rules, and git skill insights generated by AutoDev. AI Coding Assistants (Cursor, Claude, Cline, Copilot) can parse this file to instantly understand how to bootstrap, execute, and work with this codebase.

## 🛠️ Developer Environment Control Rules

AI Agents must follow these rules when configuring or executing code in this environment:

1. **Bootstrap Missing Runtimes:** Check missing runtimes with `autodev doctor`. Run `autodev setup --yes` to install Node.js, Go, Python, Docker, Bun, or other compilers automatically.
2. **Local Health Checks:** Before compiling, run `autodev doctor` to verify environment paths. Run `autodev doctor --fix` if any check fails.
3. **Execute Setup:** If the workspace packages are out of date, execute `autodev setup` or `npm`/`pnpm`/`cargo` equivalents suggested by the scanning engine.
4. **AI Context integration:** Run `autodev mcp start` to connect AutoDev directly to the AI agent via the Model Context Protocol.
